title: papaver × balansanum
intro: Papaver × balansanum, also known as the Balansan poppy, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Papaver × balansanum include its analgesic, antispasmodic, and sedative properties, which can help alleviate pain, muscle spasms, and anxiety. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat conditions like insomnia, restlessness, and skin irritations.
